creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
Update "files/patch-modules__proxy__mod_proxy_connect.c"
	with the latest version from 
        https://issues.apache.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=29744

	It also appears that the patch is applied unconditionally so
	we can remove the option.

Fix: apply attached patch
How-To-Repeat: 	build the port
